name: codex-flows-remote-control
description: Operate a remote codex-flows backend from a local Codex App install.

interface.shortDescription: Use a local Codex App to reach a remote workspace backend.
interface.longDescription: codex-flows remote control installs hookless operator skills for a local Codex App, such as a Windows install, to inspect Codex remote-control status, open an SSH or Tailscale tunnel to a remote workspace backend, and start turns through that backend.
defaultPrompt: Check whether my remote codex-flows backend is reachable.
Set up an SSH tunnel to my Tailscale VPS backend.
Start a Codex turn on the remote backend.
